# Tformance

> Engineering analytics platform that shows how your team is actually delivering — and whether AI tools are helping.

Tformance is a SaaS platform for CTOs and engineering leaders who need to understand how their team is actually delivering and whether AI coding tools are improving that delivery or just increasing output and review load. We connect to GitHub and surface delivery metrics, AI usage signals, and bottleneck explanations from PR activity.

Free during Alpha. Target audience: CTOs and VP Engineering at companies with 10-50 developers who need credible answers about team delivery and AI tool ROI.

Privacy-first: We never access source code — only PR metadata (titles, timestamps, file paths). See [Product DNA](https://tformance.com/report/) for our full product philosophy.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://tformance.com/): Main landing page with product overview
- [Pricing](https://tformance.com/pricing/): Flat-rate pricing tiers by team size
- [AI Impact Report](https://tformance.com/report/): 167K PRs analyzed - public research on AI coding impact
- [Privacy Policy](https://tformance.com/privacy/): Data handling and security practices
- [Terms of Service](https://tformance.com/terms/): Legal terms

## Features

- [Features Overview](https://tformance.com/features/): All platform capabilities
- [Dashboard & Insights](https://tformance.com/features/dashboard/): Weekly reports, AI-powered insights, health indicators
- [Analytics Deep Dive](https://tformance.com/features/analytics/): Overview, AI Adoption, Delivery, Quality, Team, Trends views
- [PR Explorer](https://tformance.com/features/pr-explorer/): Filter, annotate, and export PR data

## Comparisons

- [Compare All Tools](https://tformance.com/compare/): Overview of engineering analytics market
- [vs LinearB](https://tformance.com/compare/linearb/): Workflow automation + DORA metrics ($35-46/seat/mo)
- [vs Jellyfish](https://tformance.com/compare/jellyfish/): Enterprise engineering intelligence (~$50/seat/mo)
- [vs Swarmia](https://tformance.com/compare/swarmia/): DevEx surveys + productivity
- [vs Span](https://tformance.com/compare/span/): AI code detection specialist
- [vs Workweave](https://tformance.com/compare/workweave/): AI-focused PR analytics
- [vs Mesmer](https://tformance.com/compare/mesmer/): Engineering visibility automation
- [vs Nivara](https://tformance.com/compare/nivara/): AI engineering manager (YC F25)

## Open-Source Benchmarks

Live engineering analytics for notable open-source organizations:

- [PostHog](https://tformance.com/open-source/posthog-demo/): Product analytics platform
- [Vercel](https://tformance.com/open-source/vercel-demo/): Next.js, AI SDK, and Vercel platform
- [Supabase](https://tformance.com/open-source/supabase-demo/): Open source Firebase alternative
- [LangChain](https://tformance.com/open-source/langchain-demo/): LLM application framework
- [Cal.com](https://tformance.com/open-source/calcom-demo/): Open source scheduling
- [n8n](https://tformance.com/open-source/n8n-demo/): Open source Zapier alternative
- [Twenty CRM](https://tformance.com/open-source/twenty-demo/): Open source Salesforce alternative
- [Dify](https://tformance.com/open-source/dify-demo/): Open source LLM app platform
- [Novu](https://tformance.com/open-source/novu-demo/): Notification infrastructure
- [Coolify](https://tformance.com/open-source/coolify-demo/): Self-hosted PaaS
- [Plane](https://tformance.com/open-source/plane-demo/): Open source Jira/Linear alternative
- [Appsmith](https://tformance.com/open-source/appsmith-demo/): Open source Retool alternative

## Optional

- [Team](https://tformance.com/team/): About the team
- [LLMs Full Context](https://tformance.com/report/llms.md): Extended data for AI Impact Report

### Technical Details

Built with Django, PostgreSQL, Celery, Redis. Frontend uses HTMX, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS, DaisyUI. AI detection via LLM analysis through Groq.

### Data Collection

From GitHub: PR metadata (titles, sizes, timestamps), review counts and cycle times, file paths and change counts, author and reviewer information.

Never accessed: Source code content, file diffs or patches, commit message bodies, private messages.

### AI Detection Methodology

Tformance detects AI-assisted development through a combination of pattern analysis on PR metadata and LLM-based classification. Source code is never accessed — detection relies on PR titles, descriptions, file paths, and commit patterns. Results are directional signals, not definitive assessments. For details on how your team's data is analyzed, see the [AI Impact Report](https://tformance.com/report/).
